title: Pan-Seared Scallops with Manchego Crust
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring seared scallops with a crispy Manchego cheese crust. Perfect for a low-carb dinner.
instructions: Season the scallops with Algerian spice blend.
In a bowl, mix Manchego cheese with a pinch of salt.
Dip each scallop into the cheese mixture, coating both sides.
Heat a dolsot or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and sear the scallops for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the scallops to the oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
